name: Herb Mill XL Acrylic Grinder
summary: Herb Mill XL Acrylic Grinder — a grinder for any patient preparing dried flower.
description: The Herb Mill XL Acrylic Grinder boasts extremely precise cutting blades that expertly grind your herbs to perfection, making them ideal for vaporising. As a Storz & Bickel certified product, it is the perfect choice for achieving the perfect vaping experience. Its extra-large size of approximately 90mm is perfect for all your grinding needs. A small upgrade that makes every session more even.
